positive: Minimalist celestial animal illustration, featuring a sleek, stylized lunar fox leaping amidst glowing cosmic nebulae and crystalline stardust. The fox should have clean, defined silhouettes, rendered in contrasting deep midnight blues, glowing aquamarine, and soft lavender accents. The composition must be centered and vertical, emphasizing the fox's motion and grace against a starry, textured void. Style: Modern graphic design, vector art influence, high contrast, perfect for t-shirt printing. Lighting: Cinematic glow from the nebulae, sharp edge definition. Composition: Rule of thirds applied to the action, centered focal point.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, logos, trademarks, copyrighted characters, messy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, low detail, noisy, sepia, photo-realistic, grayscale, poor quality
